TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Greg_Ballard, title = Greg_Ballard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greg_Ballard} }

S.FORM: Greg Ballard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Greg Ballard, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Greg Ballard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Greg Ballard, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ɣreɣ βallar* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣreɣ βallar*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
